overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Subnautica showing underwater exploration of a dark bioluminescent cave system. The player swims through rocky passages following glowing jellyfish-like creatures and navigating past bioluminescent flora in a deep-sea environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep underwater basin with suspended bioluminescent flora

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through dark open water toward rocky formations while observing floating bioluminescent sphere plants

entered.detail: floating spherical bioluminescent plants glowing with teal light scattered throughout the water column
large dark rock wall formation approaching in the distance
patches of purple bioluminescent coral on the seafloor

segments.scene_description: The player swims through open deep water surrounded by floating bioluminescent sphere plants. A large rocky formation looms ahead on the left while purple coral patches are visible on the seafloor below.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky underwater passage with vertical root strands

events.description: large bioluminescent jellyfish-like creature enters view and begins leading the player through the rocky passage

agents.ego_description: swimming behind a glowing jellyfish-like creature through narrow rocky corridors and under hanging root strands

notable_agents.action: bioluminescent jellyfish creature swimming ahead, pulsing with blue light and leading the player through the passage

entered.detail: long thin root-like strands hanging down from above in the water
large translucent jellyfish-like creature with glowing blue internal structures
dark opening in the rock wall leading into a narrow cave passage

segments.scene_description: The player follows a glowing jellyfish creature through a narrow rocky passage. Hanging root strands drape from above as the creature leads toward a dark cave entrance, with the rocky walls now close on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cave tunnel with dense bioluminescent floor flora

events.description: entering narrow cave passage with dense bioluminescent blue flora covering the floor
exiting the narrow cave tunnel back into more open water

agents.ego_description: navigating through a tight cave passage covered in glowing blue floor flora, maneuvering between rocky walls

entered.detail: rough rocky walls of the narrow cave passage enclosing the swimming path
thick clusters of small glowing blue plants covering the cave floor

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a confined cave tunnel with dense glowing blue flora covering the seafloor. The rocky walls press in from both sides as the player navigates the passage before emerging back into open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep water column with particle effects and scattered flora

events.description: beginning gradual ascent toward lighter water above while swimming through particle clouds

agents.ego_description: swimming upward through open water columns with rising white particle effects and scattered bioluminescent plants

entered.detail: expansive open water space with blue gradient light from above
white glowing particles floating upward through the water like marine snow
tall isolated rock formation rising from the depths

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the cave into open deep water, swimming upward through clouds of floating white particles. Bioluminescent sphere plants drift in the water column as a large rock pillar passes by on the left, with lighter water visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey from an open bioluminescent expanse through a restrictive cave system and back into the deep ocean. It begins in open water among floating bioluminescent sphere plants and purple coral patches, moving toward a looming rocky formation. As the camera follows a glowing jellyfish creature, the environment tightens into a narrow rocky passage draped with hanging root strands that lead into a dark cave entrance. The scene then shifts into a confined tunnel where dense glowing blue flora covers the seafloor and rocky walls press in from both sides before the path opens up again. Finally, the camera emerges from the cave and swims upward through clouds of floating white particles and drifting sphere plants, passing a large rock pillar as the water lightens above.
